# DTO Types
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpActiveHealthCheckConfig # Represents active health check configuration for a YARP cluster.
  Enabled?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether active health checks are enabled.
  Interval?: timespan # Gets or sets the health check interval.
  Path: string # Gets or sets the health check path.
  Policy: string # Gets or sets the health check policy.
  Query: string # Gets or sets the health check query string.
  Timeout?: timespan # Gets or sets the health check timeout.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpForwarderRequestConfig # Represents forwarder request configuration for a YARP cluster.
  ActivityTimeout?: timespan # Gets or sets the activity timeout.
  AllowResponseBuffering?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether response buffering is allowed.
  Version: string # Gets or sets the HTTP version string.
  VersionPolicy?: enum:System.Net.Http.HttpVersionPolicy # Gets or sets the HTTP version policy.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpHealthCheckConfig # Represents health check configuration for a YARP cluster.
  Active: Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpActiveHealthCheckConfig # Gets or sets the active health check configuration.
  AvailableDestinationsPolicy: string # Gets or sets the available destinations policy.
  Passive: Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpPassiveHealthCheckConfig # Gets or sets the passive health check configuration.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpHttpClientConfig # Represents HTTP client configuration for a YARP cluster.
  DangerousAcceptAnyServerCertificate?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether to accept any server certificate.
  EnableMultipleHttp2Connections?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether multiple HTTP/2 connections are enabled.
  MaxConnectionsPerServer?: number # Gets or sets the maximum connections per server.
  RequestHeaderEncoding: string # Gets or sets the request header encoding.
  ResponseHeaderEncoding: string # Gets or sets the response header encoding.
  SslProtocols: enum:Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpSslProtocol[] # Gets or sets the SSL protocols to enable.
  WebProxy: Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpWebProxyConfig # Gets or sets the web proxy configuration.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpPassiveHealthCheckConfig # Represents passive health check configuration for a YARP cluster.
  Enabled?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether passive health checks are enabled.
  Policy: string # Gets or sets the health check policy.
  ReactivationPeriod?: timespan # Gets or sets the reactivation period.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpRouteHeaderMatch # Represents a header-based route match for a YARP route.
  IsCaseSensitive: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether the header comparison is case-sensitive.
  Mode: enum:Yarp.ReverseProxy.Configuration.HeaderMatchMode # Gets or sets the matching mode for the header comparison.
  Name: string # Gets or sets the header name to match.
  Values: string[] # Gets or sets the header values to match.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpRouteMatch # Represents route match criteria for a YARP route.
  Headers: Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpRouteHeaderMatch[] # Gets or sets the header match criteria.
  Hosts: string[] # Gets or sets the host headers to match.
  Methods: string[] # Gets or sets the HTTP methods to match.
  Path: string # Gets or sets the path pattern to match.
  QueryParameters: Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpRouteQueryParameterMatch[] # Gets or sets the query parameter match criteria.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpRouteQueryParameterMatch # Represents a query-parameter-based route match for a YARP route.
  IsCaseSensitive: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether the query parameter comparison is case-sensitive.
  Mode: enum:Yarp.ReverseProxy.Configuration.QueryParameterMatchMode # Gets or sets the matching mode for the query parameter comparison.
  Name: string # Gets or sets the query parameter name to match.
  Values: string[] # Gets or sets the query parameter values to match.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpSessionAffinityConfig # Represents session affinity configuration for a YARP cluster.
  AffinityKeyName: string # Gets or sets the affinity key name.
  Cookie: Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpSessionAffinityCookieConfig # Gets or sets the cookie configuration.
  Enabled?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether session affinity is enabled.
  FailurePolicy: string # Gets or sets the failure policy.
  Policy: string # Gets or sets the session affinity policy.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpSessionAffinityCookieConfig # Represents session affinity cookie configuration for a YARP cluster.
  Domain: string # Gets or sets the cookie domain.
  Expiration?: timespan # Gets or sets the cookie expiration.
  HttpOnly?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cookie is HTTP only.
  IsEssential?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cookie is essential.
  MaxAge?: timespan # Gets or sets the cookie max age.
  Path: string # Gets or sets the cookie path.
  SameSite?: enum:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.SameSiteMode # Gets or sets the same-site mode.
  SecurePolicy?: enum:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.CookieSecurePolicy # Gets or sets the secure policy.
Aspire.Hosting.Yarp/Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpWebProxyConfig # Represents web proxy configuration for a YARP cluster.
  Address: uri # Gets or sets the proxy address.
  BypassOnLocal?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether local addresses bypass the proxy.
  UseDefaultCredentials?: boolean # Gets or sets a value indicating whether the default credentials are used.

enum:Aspire.Hosting.Yarp.YarpSslProtocol = None | Tls12 | Tls13
